subcodes.title: Words to two Bahá’ís, spoken on 1913-03-30
subcodes.first_line: You must become fully informed with these Teachings. It is good to be thoroughly informed with science or arts or literature. Likewise you must be established in the Kingdom of God.
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @study; deepening, @poems and quotation from poetry
